I am building a thing right now with some friends, I'm not sure exactly what it is, let alone a name for it, but in order for me to gather tools around it, I am constantly bombarded by requests for names- what to name the folder? the GH repo? the discord channel?

computers almost always ask you to name things at the time of creation- that is not how names are given, names are usually given after a period of assessment and discussion, at the end of the process, such that the name captures the essence of the thing
@TravelingAnna and we will be here again. I will use the tools my elders in the 60s etc. made for me, and make new tools as well.
